title: L2 Archery
description: Add various bows and arrows with specialized effects and a set of highly customizable upgrades
body:
# L2Archery

L2 Archery is a mod that provides a variety of new bows and special arrows. You can mix and match bows and arrows to achieve the best damage or effect.

Additionally, bows can have upgrades with different effects, allowing you to create your own DIY special bow appealing to your preferences.


Discord: https://discord.gg/BCHNhsDMXz

Dependency: L2 Library, L2 Complements (for crafting materials), L2 Backpack (for quiver)

 
(Optional Compatilibity) It supports Modular Golems in the way that humanoid golems can use the bows from this mod, but you need to make sure Modular Golem version is at least 1.7.3

Optional Dependency of Bookshelf is recommended as it fix the crafting remainder of powdered snow buckets.

# Contents

- A wide variety of special bows with different appearances and abilities;
- Numerous unique arrows with different effects;
- Real-time damage and effect estimation display;
- A hint for the currently used arrow;
- Embeddable upgrades that provide additional effects for the bow.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6hD6YA2r/images/19c12f65b5be47bb1ac235455534713b9e311858.png)
